zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏强整理格局
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD维持窄幅震荡偏强结构，价格运行在1570至1580区间附近并站稳20日均线1566上方，短线多头略占优势但上行动能仍偏温和，整体处于整理蓄势阶段，市场方向等待进一步确认突破信号。

技术指标方面，MACD为轻微负值显示动能仍偏弱，尚未形成明确金叉或死叉确认信号，RSI缺失但结合价格结构判断多空相对均衡略偏多，短期缺乏强趋势驱动，更多表现为震荡修复与能量积累过程。

支撑位关注1566一线20日均线与1570整数关口共振区域，上方阻力位在1580近期高点及1600心理关口，若有效放量突破1580则有望打开小级别上行空间并延续反弹结构。

交易策略建议维持区间震荡思路，高位靠近1580及上方分批止盈，低位回踩1566附近可轻仓试多，但需严格控制仓位，若跌破1566支撑则短线转为观望，等待趋势重新确认。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is currently consolidating in a very tight range around 1579, showing low volatility and a neutral-to-slightly bullish intraday structure. Price action remains marginally above the 20-day SMA at 1566.39, indicating that the broader short-term trend is still supported despite limited upward momentum. The market appears to be coiling, suggesting a potential breakout phase once volume expands in either direction.

From an indicator standpoint, MACD at -0.3208 signals lingering bearish momentum, but the lack of a strong deviation suggests weakness rather than a confirmed downtrend. With RSI unavailable, price behavior relative to moving averages becomes more important. Trading above the SMA(20) typically reflects a mild bullish bias, though the flat 24-hour change of 0.12% confirms overall indecision between buyers and sellers.

Key support is located at 1566, aligned with the SMA(20), which acts as the first dynamic demand zone. A break below this level could expose downside toward 1550, where prior liquidity clusters may form additional support. On the upside, immediate resistance sits at 1580, followed by a stronger psychological barrier near 1600. A decisive break above 1580 would likely trigger short-term momentum continuation.

For trading strategy, range-bound tactics remain most effective until a breakout occurs. Buying near 1566–1550 with tight risk control below 1545 offers favorable reward-to-risk if support holds. Conversely, aggressive traders may look for a breakout above 1580 with confirmation in volume to target 1600 and beyond. Until then, patience and disciplined execution in the range are key.
